Clinical Disclaimer: Implant Genius v0.6 compares radiographs against confirmed reference cases provided by a practicing oral surgeon. System prompt informed by manufacturer technical specifications and radiographic identification literature. Results must always be confirmed by a qualified clinician. This tool does not constitute a diagnosis or treatment recommendation.
